rule.name: HeliosApexClassNamePrefix
rule.message: Class name must follow the pattern: BC_TYP_Name (e.g., PR_SRV_Pricing). It must start with a 2-letter Bounded Context prefix and a 3-letter Type prefix.
rule.description: Enforces a strict naming convention for Apex classes: [BoundedContext]_[Type]_[Name]. Examples: PR_SRV_Pricing (Pricing Service), BI_INV_EmailNotification (Billing Invocable).

rule.name: HeliosApexTestClassNameSuffix
rule.message: Test classes (annotated with @IsTest) must follow the naming convention and end with the '_TEST' suffix (e.g., XX_XXX_Name_TEST).
rule.description: Enforces that any Apex class annotated with @IsTest must include the '_TEST' suffix in its name. This ensures test classes are easily identifiable and consistent with the project's naming standards.
